title: zilla spinosa subsp. spinosa
intro: Zilla spinosa subsp. spinosa, also known as the thorny dragon or thorny succulent, is a plant species in the family Capparaceae. It is native to South Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant contains compounds that have been found to have antioxidant, anti-diabetic, and cardiovascular-protective properties, offering potential health benefits such as reducing oxidative stress and improving insulin sensitivity. The plant's leaves and stems can be prepared as a tea or infused in oil for herbal remedies, and it is also sometimes used in skincare products due to its anti-aging and protective properties.
